settings.question: How do I enter my prescription?
settings.answer: Choose prescription lenses on the product page and enter SPH, CYL, AXIS, and PD exactly as shown on your prescription. You can also upload a prescription file.

settings.question: What payment methods are available?
settings.answer: Available payment options are shown at checkout, including supported online payment methods enabled for your order.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Delivery timelines are shown during checkout and may vary by city, courier availability, and lens customization needs.

settings.question: Can I return my glasses?
settings.answer: Contact us as soon as possible if your order needs attention. Our team will review the issue and guide you on the available return, exchange, or correction options.

settings.question: What is PD?
settings.answer: PD is the distance between the centers of your pupils, measured in millimeters. It helps align prescription lenses correctly with your eyes.

settings.question: Do you offer progressive lenses?
settings.answer: Yes. Select the lens type on the product page and add your prescription details before adding the frame to cart.

settings.title: Questions before you order?
settings.subtitle: Clear answers for choosing frames, lenses, prescriptions, and delivery.
settings.cta_text: Need help with your prescription or frame size?
